hero.title: Real-time liquidity intelligence
hero.subtitle: On Meteora · Solana
hero.lead: Observe, reconstruct and analyze liquidity movements as they happen. Detect signals, understand flows, and stay ahead of the market.

pillars.title: All the insights, in real time

observe.title: Observe
observe.body: Track pools, liquidity changes and market activity across Meteora in real time.

reconstruct.title: Reconstruct
reconstruct.body: Rebuild liquidity history, replay movements and understand what really happened.

analyze.title: Analyze
analyze.body: Detect anomalies, identify patterns and get actionable signals instantly.

signal.title: Signal
signal.body: Get real-time alerts on key events, spikes and liquidity imbalances.

cta.title: Ready to see everything?
cta.subtitle: Join Yog-Scope and unlock the full power of liquidity intelligence.
